name: Junction City Raspberry Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain raspberries and reserve 1 cup of the juice.
2. Combine crumbs, sugar, half a teaspoon of cinnamon, and melted butter; press into a 10-inch pie plate. Bake at 375°F for 8 to 10 minutes, then cool.
3. Soften gelatin in cold water.
4. Mix reserved raspberry juice, remaining cinnamon, lemon peel, and heat until boiling.
5. Remove from heat; add softened gelatin and stir until melted. Chill until mixture begins to thicken.
6. Whip cream with vanilla and fold into the chilled mixture.
7. Add raspberries, gelatin mixture, and whipped cream to pie shell. Chill.
8. Decorate with additional whipped cream if desired.
